diff:
diff --git a/libs/langchain/langchain/retrievers/simple.py b/libs/langchain/langchain/retrievers/simple.py
--- a/libs/langchain/langchain/retrievers/simple.py
+++ b/libs/langchain/langchain/retrievers/simple.py
@@ -3,2 +3,4 @@
+    scores = [dot(q, d) for d in matrix]
+    return sorted(range(len(scores)), key=lambda i: -scores[i])[:k]

expected_comments.description: O(n) dot against full matrix; consider ANN index for large collections.
